{{Quote|I would ask those operatives to I only keep in mind the sacrifice the Scandium Team made in their escape, and the great good they did for our cause throughout their career.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Cracken]]|<ref name="AJ11" />}}
The '''Wellte-ir Massacre''' was a battle fought on [[Bresnan]], in the [[Wellte-ir system/Legends|Wellte-ir system]] early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==The battle==
The battle involved [[Scandium Team]], an [[Infiltrators/Legends|infiltrator]] unit from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Rebel Alliance Special Forces|Special Forces]]. Scandium Team encountered two [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Tank|Armor]] units undergoing field exercises on the Bresnan plains and was completely outnumbered. Fifteen of the twenty-one members of Scandium Team were killed during the four-day battle. Scandium [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Aven Cholus]] eventually managed to rescue the survivors trapped along the [[Umber Banks]].<ref name="AJ11" />

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|Much of Scandium's last mission remains classified, and though I have chosen to draft this dossier, I do not have the liberty to discuss those sealed files.|General Cracken|<ref name="AJ11" />}}
After the Wellte-ir Massacre, Scandium Team was disbanded. The survivors of the battle included [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Harovan Toth]],<ref name="AJ11" /> [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Dutra Zeneta]],<ref name="AJ10" /> [[Korgath]], Lieutenant [[Opit-Wenbruh]], Aven Cholus, and [[Rith Tar'ak]].<ref name="AJ11" />
